data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the 'Freeze-on-dispute behavior' but failed to provide any concrete evidence or checks that demonstrate this behavior is implemented. While the use case describes that the release is paused until a dispute is resolved, there are no API reads or persisted state checks included in the evidence to confirm that this behavior is functioning as required. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided regarding this specific requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for freeze-on-dispute behavior
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the release of funds is paused when a dispute is raised.
